{{Quote|Never concede to evil. I ask that the council obey its own law.|[[Tannath]]|<ref name="copl">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>}}
The '''Council of Sisters''' was the key decision-making body of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]]. When times of trial and decisions regarding the clan's stance on specific issues arose, members of the clan would look to the guidance of the council, which was composed of the twelve leading women of the clan.<ref name="copl" />

==History==
In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the Council decided to help [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and their companions repair their [[Starship/Legends|starship]], declaring war on [[Mother (title)/Legends|Mother]] [[Gethzerion]]'s [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]]. At the time, the members of the Council included [[Augwynne Djo]], Old [[Tannath]], Sister [[Azbeth]] and Sister [[Shen (Dathomiri)|Shen]].<ref name="copl" />

Fifteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Tenel Ka Djo]] convinced the Council to let them infiltrate the Nightsisters in order to save [[Lowbacca]] and the [[Solo twins]] from the witches.<ref name="YJKSA">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]''</ref>
